subject: [CLAMP] upgrade for java11
commit_message:
[CLAMP] upgrade for java11

upgrade elk version to move to java 11 for CLAMP dashboard part.

Issue-ID: CLAMP-934

Change-Id: I5b6a8064f17ab0bdd7c5fa1feb8813848d9753cc
Signed-off-by: osgn422w <gervais-martial.ngueko@intl.att.com>

entries.message:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.
